top_visual_formats: Official cinematic music video with narrative/styling aesthetic
Minimalist lyric visualizer or static audio-focused format
dominant_emotion: Gritty street confidence with luxury attitude and occasional vulnerability
oversaturated: Standard official music video production, rap diss track beef narratives, wealth/status flex content
hook_pattern_of_day: Artist name + song title + [Official MV/Audio/Video] in capitals
contrarian_gap: Spiritual/sacred/transcendent narratives and instrumental-led (beat-first) content are completely absent from mainstream trending—opportunity for mystical electronic music positioned as ritual rather than club product
